title: Renewable Hydrogen Producer HY2GEN Secures Eur 47 Million
content: Hy2gen, a global renewable hydrogen producer, has secured â‚¬47 million in funding from existing shareholders, including Hy24, Technip Energies, and the family fund BenDa. The funds will accelerate the development of Hy2genâ€™s Power-to-X projects, such as green hydrogen, ammonia, and e-fuels, in Europe, Canada, and South America. The company aims to finalize the design and enter the construction phase of projects like the 300 MW â€œCourantâ€ project in Canada and the â€œIversonâ€ ammonia plant in Norway, targeting a total installed electrolysis capacity of 2 GW by 2027. This capital raise will support Hy2gen in its mission to decarbonize hard-to-abate sectors, including aviation, shipping, chemicals, and fertilizers.
author: Analysts Account
